title: Senior Frontend Developer at Medlife Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Medlife Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Frontend Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
